commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=80b0ed92405b82976e40f115de3a260ae0c6884e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens embedded session-fence benign-change handling for queued user transcript appends, same-length linear transcript rewrites, unchanged text refreshes, and nested active-lock writes.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +74. Total +88 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source inspection: on PR head, appending a well-formed transcript entry whose nested message has `role: "user"` makes the new benign predicate return true and lets `assertSessionFileFence` trust the state. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author or maintainer changes to preserve external-takeover detection and contributor-provided real behavior proof; this is not a safe ClawSweeper repair lane while proof is missing.

target.title: Fix embedded session fence for queued transcript writes
target.body:
## Summary
- allow queued user transcript appends while the embedded prompt lock is released
- allow same-length linear transcript rewrites and unchanged text refreshes to advance the session fence
- avoid publishing nested writes while an active session write lock is already running

## Why
OpenClaw can append queued user turns or rewrite linear transcript metadata while an embedded prompt is waiting on model I/O. Those OpenClaw-owned updates should not be classified as external session takeover.

## Tests
- `pnpm exec node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: keepsilenceqp

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
